text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp starts today. How we use this time
will greatly affect Teio's future races.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yippee! It's finally that time again!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The beach, the festivals, the watermelons! This
year is gonna be a blast once again!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! But, of course, the most important thing is
my training!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I gotta work hard to get stronger, so I need you
right there beside me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My annual summer camp with Tokai Teio begins
again!
